title: Holiday Season & Boone NC Real Estate: What to Expect
excerpt: The holiday season brings a unique rhythm to Boone NC real estate — one that savvy buyers and sellers can absolutely use to their advantage. Local High Country REALTOR Andrew Plyler breaks down what really happens to the mountain property market when the lights go up and the slopes fill with snow.
image_alt: King Street in downtown Boone NC decorated for the holiday season, showing local shops and mountain charm
